username.description: EasyPost API key, sent as the HTTP Basic username with an empty password. Never logged.

base_url.description: EasyPost API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects created at or after this time are read on a fresh sync (a persisted cursor takes precedence on repeat syncs).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
